name: Cultivators
ai_rationale: Self-employed land-bound physical work, weather-dependent. AI tools (Plantix, satellite crop monitoring) augment decisions but cannot substitute the labour. Mechanisation is uneconomic at India's 1.1 ha avg holding size.

name: Agricultural labourers
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: Outdoor manual wage labour. AI exposure essentially zero — capital cost of automation far exceeds labour cost at Indian wage levels.

name: Dairy & livestock workers
ai_rationale: Animal handling, milking, fodder management — predominantly physical. IoT sensors and breed-management apps assist but the core labour is hands-on.

name: Fishing & aquaculture
ai_rationale: Outdoor physical work; AI used in fish-stock prediction and aquaculture monitoring, but field labour is irreducible.

name: Construction labour
ai_rationale: Manual outdoor work on heterogeneous sites. Robotics adoption is decades away in Indian construction at current wage levels.

name: Civil engineers
ai_rationale: Project design and management; AI assists with CAD, structural analysis, and BIM. Significant productivity uplift but the on-site coordination work remains human.

name: Architects
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: Drafting, rendering, and concept exploration are now substantially AI-augmented (Midjourney, Stable Diffusion architectural workflows, AutoCAD generative design). Junior drafting work most exposed.

name: Textile workers
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: Operating textile machinery and finishing work. Computer-vision QC is emerging, but core fabric handling is dexterity-bound and India's cheap labour delays automation.

name: Machine operators
ai_rationale: Skilled machine operation with significant procedural element. AI-vision quality inspection and predictive maintenance reshape parts of the work; the operator role remains.

name: Auto & components
ai_rationale: Mixed assembly + skilled machining. Indian auto-component industry adopting robotics + AI inspection, but slower than global peers due to wage arbitrage.

name: Quality control inspectors
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: Visual inspection is the canonical computer-vision task. Major Indian manufacturers (Tata, Mahindra, Bajaj) are deploying AI vision systems; 1.2M jobs are structurally exposed.

name: Industrial engineers
ai_rationale: Process optimisation, simulation modelling, and quality systems design. AI assists but cross-functional coordination and on-shop-floor judgement remain human.

name: Retail sales associates
ai_rationale: In-person retail interaction is hard to automate, but back-end inventory and demand-forecasting tasks are increasingly AI-driven, reducing total store staffing.

name: Wholesale traders
ai_rationale: B2B trade relationships, credit decisions, and logistics coordination. AI agents emerging in supplier discovery and pricing, but the trust-based wholesale model holds.

name: Cashiers
ai_rationale: UPI ubiquity + self-checkout = direct substitution. Reliance Retail, DMart, Amazon Fresh India are all piloting cashier-less formats. 4.5M jobs structurally exposed within 5 years.

name: Customer service (retail)
ai_rationale: Customer service is the most directly substituted task category by current LLMs. Indian D2C brands routinely report 60-80% of tier-1 support handled by AI agents.

name: TCS engineers
ai_rationale: Mid-tier offshore code/test/maintain work is the exact task profile AI coding assistants do best. The July 2025 12,000-layoff is the loudest signal yet. Senior architects less exposed.
source: TCS Q4 FY25 + Jul 2025 layoff announcement

name: Infosys engineers
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: Same task profile as TCS. Parekh's Jevons-paradox bet (10× productivity → 10× more software → more engineers) is plausible but unverified. Mid-tier engineers most exposed.

name: Wipro engineers
ai_rationale: Mid-tier offshore application services. Net headcount declined for two consecutive years (FY24 -24K, FY25 -708). Structural exposure is high.

name: HCLTech engineers
ai_rationale: Similar task profile to top-3. CEO Vijayakumar explicitly: 'clients want to double revenue with half the headcount.' Linearity between revenue and headcount is breaking.

name: Tech Mahindra engineers
ai_rationale: Telecom-heavy IT services with significant network-operations work. Network-ops AI agents are maturing; core engineering work follows the same trajectory as TCS/Infosys.

name: Mid-tier IT services
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: LTIMindtree, Coforge, Mphasis, Persistent. Same business model as top-5 but less pricing power. More exposed because clients consolidate vendors as productivity rises.

name: Small / regional IT services
ai_rationale: Tier-2/3 firms compete on price for commoditised work. AI coding tools have eliminated the wage arbitrage that justified their existence. Highest displacement risk in IT services.

name: Indian product startups
ai_rationale: Engineering at Indian unicorns and product startups. AI is a productivity multiplier; firms are hiring AI-native engineers at the senior end, slowing junior hiring. Net effect mixed.

name: Freelance developers
ai_rationale: Indian freelance developers on Upwork/Toptal compete globally on price. AI coding tools compress that arbitrage; commodity freelance work most exposed.

name: GCC software engineering
ai_rationale: In-house engineering at MNCs in India. AI is a productivity tool; the work is closer to product engineering than IT services. Less commoditised, more defensible.

name: GCC engineering R&D
ai_rationale: Engineering R&D for global parents (chips, automotive, industrial). AI assists simulation, design exploration, and code generation. Core domain expertise remains scarce.

name: GCC data & analytics
ai_rationale: Data engineering, BI, and analytics. AI is augmentative — AI-native data tooling (Hex, Snowflake Cortex, Databricks AI) makes each analyst 2-3× more productive but demand is rising faster.

name: GCC shared services
ai_rationale: Captive shared-services work (finance ops, HR ops, supply-chain coordination). Same task profile as BPM — high direct exposure to AI agents and document AI.

name: GCC AI/ML specialists
ai_rationale: The occupational layer that *builds* the AI displacing other roles. Demand is growing 25%+ YoY; pay premiums are widening. The Indian AI-talent paradox in one tile.
source: Zinnov 2025 - 120K+ AI pros in Indian GCCs

name: Voice / call centre agents
hiring_trend_label: Strongly declining (>10% YoY drop in headcount)
ai_rationale: The canonical India-specific AI substitution case. LimeChat: 1 bot at ₹1L/mo replaces ~15 agents. Net BPM hiring down 10× since FY22. 700K jobs at direct, near-term risk.
source: TeamLease via Reuters Oct 2025; LimeChat case

name: Data entry / processing
hiring_trend_label: Strongly declining (>10% YoY drop in headcount)
ai_rationale: Document AI (Textract, Document Intelligence, Claude vision) reads forms at higher accuracy than human entry clerks with audit trails. Among the most directly substituted task categories.

name: F&A outsourcing
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: F&A outsourcing — invoice processing, reconciliation, financial close. Genpact discloses ~330 GenAI solutions in production already. Junior F&A work substantially automated.

name: Transaction processing
ai_rationale: Transaction processing is rule-based document workflow — the highest-fit task for AI agents. Major Indian BPMs are repricing these engagements as outcome-based, not FTE-based.

name: Medical transcription / coding
hiring_trend_label: Strongly declining (>10% YoY drop in headcount)
ai_rationale: Medical coding maps clinical narrative to ICD/CPT codes — a high-volume document-classification task. AI coders (3M, Optum, AKASA) match human accuracy; Indian medical-coding BPM is at risk.

name: HR outsourcing
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: Payroll processing, benefits admin, compliance filings. AI agents emerging in employee-query handling; payroll calculations already automated. Mid-tier work exposed.

name: Insurance agents
ai_rationale: Indian insurance sales is relationship-driven, but lead qualification, policy comparison, and back-office processing are increasingly AI-driven. PolicyBazaar-style platforms shrink the agent layer.

name: Bank clerks & tellers
ai_rationale: Branch-level transactional banking is the exact task category UPI + AI customer service replaced. Indian PSU banks shrinking branch headcount; 1.8M jobs structurally exposed.

name: Accountants & auditors
ai_rationale: Bookkeeping, GST filings, tax compliance. AI tools handle 60-70% of routine accounting; CA-level judgement, advisory, and audit work remain. Junior accountants most exposed.

name: Financial advisors
ai_rationale: Robo-advisory platforms (Zerodha, Groww, Smallcase) shrink the routine advisory layer. Higher-touch private-wealth and behavioural advisory remain. Mixed exposure.

name: Loan processors / officers
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: Loan underwriting and processing — Indian fintechs (KreditBee, Lendingkart, Paytm) underwrite consumer loans at machine speed. Bank loan officers competing with algorithmic underwriting.

name: NBFC / fintech ops
ai_rationale: Operations at Indian fintech firms — KYC, fraud review, dispute handling. AI agents handle the majority of L1 queries; ops teams pivoting to exception handling.

name: Chartered Accountants
ai_rationale: Chartered Accountants — audit, tax advisory, M&A. Higher-end CA work (statutory audit, complex tax, deal advisory) requires professional judgment less exposed to AI. Junior CA articleship work substantially exposed.

name: Bank branch managers
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: Branch oversight, local relationship management, compliance supervision. AI assists with dashboards and risk scoring; the people-management and local-trust elements remain human.

name: Investment analysts
ai_rationale: Equity research, financial modelling, investment memos. AI tools generate first-draft models and research instantly; senior analysts increasingly review AI output rather than build from scratch.

name: Stock brokers / traders
ai_rationale: Order execution and routine advice are platform-mediated; differentiated brokerages move to algorithmic execution and quantitative research. Retail broking commoditised.

name: School teachers (govt)
ai_rationale: In-person K-12 teaching at government schools. AI tutoring tools augment but cannot substitute classroom management, social-emotional development, and the credentialing function of teachers.

name: Clerical & admin staff (govt)
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: Government clerical work — file movement, data entry, certificate processing — is highly automatable. Politically protected in India: task exposure high, employment outcome insulated.

name: Police
ai_rationale: Field policing, investigation, community management. AI assists with surveillance, evidence analysis, and FIR drafting; the core field work is irreducible.

name: Other PSU employees
ai_rationale: Mix of clerical, technical, and field roles across PSUs. Task-level exposure varies widely; employment is heavily protected. Score reflects task-mix, not employment risk.

name: Healthcare staff (govt)
ai_rationale: Government doctors, ANMs, ASHAs. India has acute healthcare-worker shortage; demand far exceeds supply. AI assists diagnosis but expands access rather than substitutes labour.

name: Defence personnel
ai_rationale: Military personnel. AI reshapes intelligence, surveillance, and weapons systems but the field-soldier role remains. Specialised technical roles see higher AI augmentation.

name: Indian Railways staff
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: Indian Railways staff — mix of station ops, train ops, maintenance, clerical. Ticketing largely automated; scheduling and predictive maintenance are AI-augmented; track and signal staff irreducible.

name: Postal workers
ai_rationale: Postal sorting and delivery. Sorting is already heavily automated; last-mile delivery handled by India Post against a shrinking letter-volume backdrop. Office-side roles most exposed.

name: Nurses
ai_rationale: Hands-on patient care, medication administration, physical assessment. AI assists documentation and triage but cannot substitute the bedside role. India has a structural nursing shortage.

name: Doctors
ai_rationale: Diagnostic AI (radiology, dermatology, pathology) assists but doctors retain treatment decisions and patient relationships. Specialist work less exposed; general OPD work more so.

name: Pharmacists
ai_rationale: Indian retail pharmacy is largely transactional dispensing — exposed to online pharmacy platforms (Tata 1mg, PharmEasy). Clinical pharmacist roles less exposed.

name: Hospital admin
ai_rationale: Hospital admin — billing, insurance coordination, scheduling, supply management. Document AI and scheduling agents directly substitute most of this work.

name: Lab technicians
ai_rationale: Sample handling remains physical; result analysis and image interpretation are AI-augmented. Pathology and radiology technicians see higher exposure than histology lab staff.

name: Diagnostic radiologists
ai_rationale: Radiology AI is among the most mature medical AI domains. India has acute radiologist shortage so AI initially expands access; long-term, demand growth slows as productivity rises 3-5×.

name: School teachers (private)
ai_rationale: Private K-12 teaching. AI tutoring tools (Khan Academy, BYJU's, ChatGPT) augment learning but the classroom credentialing function holds.

name: Private tutors
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: 1-on-1 supplementary tutoring — direct competition from AI tutors at near-zero marginal cost. Top-end tutoring (board exams, IIT-JEE) more defensible than primary-school tuition.

name: College & university faculty
ai_rationale: Higher-ed teaching, research, and administration. Research work AI-augmented; teaching credentialing and mentorship remain human. Lab-based fields less exposed.

name: Coaching / test prep
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: Test-prep coaching (JEE, NEET, UPSC, CAT). ChatGPT-class models solve the majority of objective problems and explain solutions. Test-prep business model under pressure.

name: EdTech roles
ai_rationale: Edtech operations roles — content production, ops, sales. Content authoring increasingly AI-driven; sales remain human. Sector itself contracting since Byju's collapse.

name: Influencers & creators
ai_rationale: Creator economy. AI tools augment content production but the audience attachment is irreducibly human (parasocial). New AI-generated creators emerging but real-creator demand growing.

name: Content writers
hiring_trend_label: Strongly declining (>10% YoY drop in headcount)
ai_rationale: Among the most directly substituted occupations by current AI. SEO blog content, marketing collateral, product descriptions are GPT-4-class quality at near-zero marginal cost.

name: Graphic designers
hiring_trend_label: Slowly declining (<3% YoY drop or stagnant)
ai_rationale: Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion already produce design output competitive with mid-level human designers. Brand-specific and senior creative work less exposed.

name: Social media managers
ai_rationale: Content calendar planning, copy generation, performance reporting. AI agents handle drafting and scheduling; senior strategy and brand voice remain human.

name: Photographers
ai_rationale: Event and product photography remain physical; stock photography substantially substituted by generated images. Wedding/event most defensible; commercial stock photography most exposed.

name: Video editors
ai_rationale: Video editing pipelines have AI features (auto-cut, captioning, b-roll generation) integrated. Long-form storytelling editors less exposed than short-form social-media editors.

name: Animation / VFX
ai_rationale: VFX pipelines are heavily AI-augmented (rotoscoping, in-betweening, upscaling). Indian VFX shops adopting AI tools to compete on cost; junior roles most affected.

name: Translators
hiring_trend_label: Strongly declining (>10% YoY drop in headcount)
ai_rationale: Neural machine translation achieved near-human quality 2-3 years ago. Per-word rates have collapsed 60-80%. Surviving demand is specialised post-editing only.

name: Journalists
ai_rationale: News aggregation, summarisation, and basic reporting are heavily AI-augmented. Investigative and feature journalism more defensible. Indian news budgets shrinking independent of AI.

name: Lawyers (litigation)
ai_rationale: Litigation — in-court advocacy, client management, strategic judgment — remains human. Brief preparation, research, and document drafting are AI-augmented (~50% productivity uplift in research).

name: HR professionals
ai_rationale: Recruitment screening, employee-query handling, policy compliance — substantial AI substitution. HRBP and senior org-design roles less exposed.

name: Paralegals & legal research
ai_rationale: Document review, legal research, contract redlining — exactly what current LLMs do at or near attorney quality. Indian legal-process-outsourcing severely exposed.

name: Corporate legal counsel
ai_rationale: Contract review, compliance, due-diligence — increasingly AI-assisted. Indian in-house counsel reshaping toward higher-judgement, lower-volume work.

name: Management consultants
ai_rationale: Management consulting — research, modelling, deck production are heavily AI-augmented. Client relationships and senior judgement remain. Mid-tier consultants most exposed.

name: Truck drivers
ai_rationale: Long-haul driving. Autonomous trucking is far from deployment in Indian conditions (road quality, traffic patterns, regulatory environment). 5-10 year horizon at minimum.

name: Cab / auto drivers
ai_rationale: App-platform driving (Ola, Uber, Rapido). Autonomous vehicles 10+ years out in India. Dispatch and pricing AI optimises but does not substitute the driver.

name: Last-mile delivery
ai_rationale: Last-mile delivery — Zomato, Swiggy, Zepto, Blinkit, Amazon, Flipkart. Quick-commerce growth is creating demand far faster than AI substitutes; one of the fastest-growing Indian job categories.

name: Warehouse workers
ai_rationale: Warehouse operations. Large e-commerce warehouses (Amazon, Flipkart) deploying robotics + AI vision; SME warehouses still manual. Mixed exposure.

name: Logistics coordinators
ai_rationale: Logistics coordination — load planning, route optimisation, freight matching, customs documentation. Heavy document workflow + agentic optimisation. Direct substitution risk.

name: Pilots & airline crew
ai_rationale: Commercial aviation. AI assists flight management, weather routing, and predictive maintenance; regulatory and trust factors keep the pilot role for 15+ years.

name: Restaurant staff
ai_rationale: Service, kitchen, and front-of-house. Ordering substituted by tablets/apps; service and cooking remain physical. Cloud-kitchens automating prep but the labour pool remains large.

name: Hotel staff
ai_rationale: Front-desk substantially self-service; housekeeping and F&B service remain. AI assists revenue management and guest queries; physical hospitality holds.

name: Event management
ai_rationale: Vendor coordination, logistics, client management. AI assists planning tools and supplier matching; on-the-day execution remains human-intensive.

name: Tour guides
ai_rationale: AI travel companions (apps with multimodal LLMs, AR overlays) substitute the information role; in-person hosting and storytelling remain. Higher-end guided experiences most defensible.

name: Travel agents
ai_rationale: Online travel platforms (MakeMyTrip, Goibibo, EaseMyTrip) plus AI trip-planning have substantially eliminated routine travel agency. Specialist travel (luxury, niche) survives.
